history.content: Startup status is mostly constrained right now: task and schedule backends are unavailable, so there are no live current-task or upcoming-schedule signals to act on from this snapshot. Today’s notes highlight two key operational lessons—graceful no-file handling for intermittent intraday logs, and a prior X→Telegram hang caused by using an unknown tool (`browser_send_to_telegram`) without immediate fallback, which left a declared-plan step stuck. Where things left off: you had just requested the weekly self-improvement performance review run, with emphasis on using prior schedule-context patterns.
